chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.99 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judges ______________________________________________________________ For hg of case 16.12.2025. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General along with Inspector Azeemuddin, CTD Karachi. Mr. Habib Ahmed, advocate for respondent. ------------ MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO:- Learned APG submits that this application impugning an order dated 12.02.2025, passed by Anti- Terrorism Court No.VI, Karachi, restoring possession of the case property viz. crackers to accused has become infructuous in that the accused has been acquitted vide judgment dated 20.11.2025 which prosecution intends to challenge in an acquittal appeal including the property order which simply refers to the present order without however determining its fate as to whether the property found in excess of the licensee and was required to be confiscated or not. 2. At his request that this application has become infructuous, it is disposed of in the terms as above, whereby the prosecution would be at liberty to challenge the restoration of property in favour of the accused in the acquittal appeal if so advised. The Cr. Revision Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
